bgms 0.1.6.4

  • Changelog

Extract Main Effect Estimates

Source: R/extractor_functions.R
extract_main_effects.Rd

Retrieves posterior mean main-effect parameters from a model fitted with bgm() or bgmCompare(). For OMRF models these are category thresholds; for mixed MRF models these include discrete thresholds and continuous means. GGM models have no main effects and return NULL.

Usage

extract_main_effects(bgms_object)

Arguments

bgms_object

A fitted model object of class bgms (from bgm()) or bgmCompare (from bgmCompare()).

Value

The structure depends on the model type:

GGM (bgms)

NULL (invisibly). GGM models have no main effects; use extract_precision() to obtain the precision matrix.

OMRF (bgms)

A numeric matrix with one row per variable and one column per category threshold, containing posterior means. Columns beyond the number of categories for a variable are NA.

Mixed MRF (bgms)

A list with two elements:

discrete

A numeric matrix (p rows x max_categories columns) of posterior mean thresholds for discrete variables.

continuous

A numeric matrix (q rows x 1 column) of posterior mean continuous variable means.

bgmCompare

A matrix with one row per post-warmup iteration, containing posterior samples of baseline main-effect parameters.

Details

Extract Main Effect Estimates

See also

bgm(), bgmCompare(), extract_pairwise_interactions(), extract_category_thresholds()

Other extractors: extract_arguments(), extract_category_thresholds(), extract_ess(), extract_group_params(), extract_indicator_priors(), extract_indicators(), extract_log_odds(), extract_pairwise_interactions(), extract_partial_correlations(), extract_posterior_inclusion_probabilities(), extract_precision(), extract_rhat(), extract_sbm()

Examples

# \donttest{
fit = bgm(x = Wenchuan[, 1:3])
#> 2 rows with missing values excluded (n = 360 remaining).
#> To impute missing values instead, use na_action = "impute".
#> Chain 1 (Warmup): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 100/2000 (5.0%)
#> Chain 2 (Warmup): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 139/2000 (7.0%)
#> Chain 3 (Warmup): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 89/2000 (4.5%)
#> Chain 4 (Warmup): ⦗━╺━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 75/2000 (3.8%)
#> Total   (Warmup): ⦗━━╺━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 403/8000 (5.0%)
#> Elapsed: 0s | ETA: 0s
#> Chain 1 (Warmup): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 450/2000 (22.5%)
#> Chain 2 (Warmup): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 499/2000 (24.9%)
#> Chain 3 (Warmup): ⦗━━━━━━━━╺━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 407/2000 (20.3%)
#> Chain 4 (Warmup): ⦗━━━━━━━╺━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 365/2000 (18.2%)
#> Total   (Warmup): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 1721/8000 (21.5%)
#> Elapsed: 1s | ETA: 4s
#> Chain 1 (Warmup): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 850/2000 (42.5%)
#> Chain 2 (Warmup): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 884/2000 (44.2%)
#> Chain 3 (Warmup): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 799/2000 (40.0%)
#> Chain 4 (Warmup): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╺━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 756/2000 (37.8%)
#> Total   (Warmup): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╺━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 3289/8000 (41.1%)
#> Elapsed: 1s | ETA: 1s
#> Chain 1 (Sampling): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 1200/2000 (60.0%)
#> Chain 2 (Sampling): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 1242/2000 (62.1%)
#> Chain 3 (Sampling): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╺━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 1151/2000 (57.6%)
#> Chain 4 (Sampling): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╺━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 1110/2000 (55.5%)
#> Total   (Sampling): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 4703/8000 (58.8%)
#> Elapsed: 2s | ETA: 1s
#> Chain 1 (Sampling): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 1550/2000 (77.5%)
#> Chain 2 (Sampling): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╺━━━━━━━⦘ 1605/2000 (80.2%)
#> Chain 3 (Sampling): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 1487/2000 (74.4%)
#> Chain 4 (Sampling): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╺━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 1467/2000 (73.4%)
#> Total   (Sampling): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 6108/8000 (76.3%)
#> Elapsed: 2s | ETA: 1s
#> Chain 1 (Sampling): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 1900/2000 (95.0%)
#> Chain 2 (Sampling): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 1946/2000 (97.3%)
#> Chain 3 (Sampling): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 1848/2000 (92.4%)
#> Chain 4 (Sampling): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╺━━━⦘ 1815/2000 (90.8%)
#> Total   (Sampling): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 7509/8000 (93.9%)

#> Chain 1 (Sampling): ⦗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━⦘ 2000/2000 (100.0%)

#> Elapsed: 3s | ETA: 0s
extract_main_effects(fit)
#>                  [,1]      [,2]      [,3]       [,4]
#> intrusion  0.80551268 -1.178783 -3.539132  -7.449839
#> dreams    -0.40509187 -3.298885 -6.354711 -10.449802
